goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'north indian' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'south'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'indian' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
